metric_value: CD-RW did become ubiquitous in office desktops 2003-2006 (standard across HP, Dell, eMachines business lines), validating the 'valid uses per department' thesis. However, CD-RW was superseded by DVD±RW (2004+), USB flash drives (2005+), and network/cloud storage (2008+) faster than the multi-year 'per department' framing implied. Direction correct, durability overstated.
